body: Cool video. My buddies and I used to run wild on Loyola's campus. This is way before the complete campus makeover. We were there way before and during the construction of most of those building. We'd slam down any type of beer we could get from Bruno's or the other joints on Sheridan. This was the time of $1.49 and $2.49 six packs; the $2.99 was for Bud talls. I could go on and on...

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body: I attended NU but my son attends  UChicago. Just realized NU doesn’t have a traditional quad, but lake is awesome. Meanwhile UChicgo has beautiful quads and gardens and look-at-me artistic elements on gothic buildings. In the end, NU feels like vacation spot especially summertime, while UChicago feels like a sacred place of learning. As my curiosity deepens with age, I revere the study more.
author: @stacysaunders7708

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body: My son’s HS sent 21 students from one graduating class recently to U Chicago, and my brother-in-law went to NW Kellogg School of Management, we will be visiting NW and U. of Chicago next week, so excited to finally visit Chicago and see it firsthand. Great video!
author: @psudoctor3336

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body: I miss my US days. Utopia. World has many downers but few uplifters. I am happy there is at least one place who can take a stance.

body: I'm still deciding on transferring to Northwestern or not but I got in here as a transfer from my current school as an international student!
author: @bluephoenix8630

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body: DePaul is better for college. A wonderful private, Catholic, Big East Conference university. It’s located right in the best neighborhood in Chicago (Lincoln Park)—not in sketch south side of Chicago, not far away Evanston. DePaul has a primacy in teaching—not research. For college-level students, that’s often better than a research-intensive university.
author: @user-fs8tl7ni1w

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body:
DePaul is best! ​​⁠Northwestern is in a suburb outside of Chicago; UChicago is in a terrible neighborhood in Chicago. DePaul is in a phenomenal neighborhood in the best part of Chicago.

I would rather send my kids to DePaul than either of those two other schools. It’s a better college atmosphere. Most people don’t want to live in a suburb or in a sketch part of a city for college.
author: @user-fs8tl7ni1w

title: Life at Loyola University Chicago | best dorms, dining, city life
body:
Great vid and good advice..

I am a Loyola alumnus. Currently, I am a Grad student at UChicago. LUC really helped and vouched for me to get into a highly competitive UChicago grad program. I still feel Loyola's core curriculum is too rigorous for a BA though. Nonetheless, a great, beautiful, and unique university.

I took 5/6 classes per semester too generally.

If you go to LUC, during a storm over the lake , take the elevator all the way up to the top floor of Mundelein Hall and go to room where you can watch it. I did that often :D.....
author: @EcksPression

title: Life at Loyola University Chicago | best dorms, dining, city life
